subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — we'd love to explore this with you.

I'm available for a 30-minute introductory call any time this week. Please let me know which of the following slots works best on your end:

- Wednesday April 29: 2:00 PM – 4:00 PM UTC
- Thursday April 30: 10:00 AM – 12:00 PM UTC
- Friday May 1: 11:00 AM – 1:00 PM UTC

Regarding the internal contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share those, as we keep those details private and route all external enquiries through our team. If you'd like to reach them, the best path is through me for now, and I can make sure the right people are looped in.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards,
Assistant
